step1.title: What is your role?
step1.residentDesc: I receive packages at my apartment

step2.title: Which apartment do you live in?
step2.noApartments: No apartments registered. Contact the concierge.

Home.heroDesc: Transform the parcel chaos in your building. Every package, registered, notified, and delivered with total order.
Home.step1Desc: The courier arrives. The concierge scans or enters the package in seconds from any device. No paperwork.
Home.step2Desc: The system automatically alerts the resident. They know exactly that their package is waiting.
Home.step3Desc: The resident presents their unique QR. Digital signature and the package is delivered with evidence.
Home.conciergeHeadline: From box chaos to digital order
Home.benefit1Desc: Every package has a complete history: who received it, when it arrived, and when it was picked up.
Home.benefit2Desc: Unique QR codes per parcel. Nobody can pick up a package without verified authorization.
Home.benefit3Desc: Works from any browser. The concierge from their PC, the resident from their phone.
Home.ctaDesc: Access now and start managing every package in your building with full traceability.
